question: What text is displayed on the white mug when the man on the left leans forward and laughs? A. I ASK FOR VOTES B. I LOST FOR WEE C. A LOSS FOR WORDS D. I LOOK FOR W
What hour value appears in the scheduling text on the opening title card?
What color is the button-down shirt worn by the man with short dark hair sitting in the blue armchair?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: One man wearing a grey shirt sits in a blue armchair on the left. Another man wearing a striped tie sits behind a wooden desk on the right. The man behind the desk gestures with open hands. A white mug with blue text and a black microphone rest on the desk. A large moon graphic decorates the blue backdrop behind the desk area.

question: How many small colored dots are visible?

A. green leafy plant situated next to the armchair B. scenic backdrop of a coastline at night with lights C. man with reddish-brown hair, wearing a dark suit, light blue shirt, and striped tie D. man with short dark hair, wearing a dark suit jacket over a grey button-down shirt

What action is the man wearing a dark suit jacket on the left performing? A. holding B. laughing C. standing D. speaking
Describe the sequence of visual elements and actions shown in the video from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the title card displays 'CONAN' with colored dots and logos; at 2s, the scene shows a man with reddish-brown hair behind a desk and a man with dark hair in a blue armchair; at 4s, the man with reddish-brown hair gestures with both hands raised while speaking; at 10s, the man with dark hair sits with hands on legs while looking at the other man; at 18s, microphone and mug remain visible on desk between them.
